_doc: Curated per-cell corrections for BS rows the deterministic extractor cannot recover (one-off OCR/layout artifacts) but whose correct values are legible in the PDF. Applied by scripts/apply_overrides.py to the production DB + pushed to D1, NO re-extraction. Each verified to bring its partition to 0 validation failures (dry-run). amount_total authoritative; tl+fc=total. NOT for genuine source defects or whole-section format breakage (those stay flagged).

overrides.note: stray 'v' fused to marker 'vXIV.' dropped the equity row
ECL marker garbled '1. B1.e4kl'; values legible
YP '-155.350' misparsed as -155.35
deferred-tax roman value wrapped off label line; TL-only like XI
deferred-tax roman value wrapped off label line; TL-only like XI
minority-interest row absorbed garbage 12,042,579; true value 0
source TL typo 746.469→796.469; forced by parent 1.3 TL (9.310.241+x=10.106.710) and row total 4.671.868-FC 3.875.399
source TL typo 336.253→336.235; Total column 336.235 is the value that foots TOTAL ASSETS

source TRY typo 19.501.461→19.815.961; FC column foots exactly, TL column short by 314.500, row total 37.266.819 locked by grand total + cross-check
dipnot 'I-10' leaked: label ate the 'I', value column captured -10; deposit bank has no lease receivables → 0 (II group foots with 2.2=0)
V. roman marker missing in unconsolidated page text → whole row dropped; statement total short by exactly 3.043.626. Inserted at order 39 (after 4.3.2, before VI.)
TL '2.818.188' misparsed as decimal 2818.188; total column already correct
